summary: Single coherent PR refactoring `fabric install` terminal UX, derived from grill GRL-20260625-install-flatness (21 locked constraints C-01..C-21). Wave 1 lands the backbone: collapse the pipeline.ts if(renderer)/else fork so STATIC visuals (icons, per-stage badges, summary card, error box) always render on the interactive path, rework shouldUseInstallRenderer to kill the --yes/--dry-run-only gate (F1 root cause), de-duplicate phase headers, and add 4-state renderer tests. Wave 2 mounts feature work on the backbone: dual-slot store model (1 personal + 1 team, with required_stores max-1 validation/migration), per-phase result lines + validate enrichment + scan payoff, and first-install vs re-install tone with smart health-check collapse. Wave 3 is cross-cutting: i18n completeness (route remaining hardcoded English through t()) and semantic-search precheck + audible rollback.
approach: F1 (TASK-001) is the structural backbone everything renders through; build it first and prove it with four-state regression tests (interactive / --yes / --dry-run / non-TTY). TASK-003/004 depend on TASK-001 because they emit through the unified renderer (per-phase result lines, scan payoff surface, health-check collapse card). TASK-002 (store dual-slot) does its R6 schema validation/migration first then rebuilds the store phase as a two-slot panel; it renders store-slot status through the unified renderer so it also depends on TASK-001. TASK-005 (i18n) and TASK-006 (semantic precheck + rollback) are independent of the renderer wiring and run in parallel as cross-cutting. Red-lines (grill C-07): do NOT alter clack prompt logic beyond what C-08/C-09 require; ALL new user-facing strings go through t() with BOTH en + zh-CN keys; NO third render path.

stages: shouldUseInstallRenderer decides renderer presence (reworked: always-on for interactive static path)
pipeline.execute() renders pipeline-level header per phase (single header, icons + badges)
each stage returns StageResult; pipeline renders result line (result+key-items) via unified renderer
env stage surfaces <=4 forensicReport findings as scan payoff
store stage renders two-slot status panel (personal slot + team slot)
buildSummary aggregates dispositions; if re-install AND all idempotent -> collapse to health-check card
on failure: rollback emits user-visible feedback; renderError box rendered on interactive path too

design_decisions: Single renderer path: static visuals always render on interactive path; animated spinner only when no pending clack prompt (C-01)
shouldUseInstallRenderer no longer gates on --yes/--dry-run; renderer present whenever TTY interactive (F1 inversion fix, C-02)
Stage-level headers removed (hooks/mcp formatStageHeader); pipeline owns the single [N/7] icon+label header (C-13)
required_stores array regularized to max-1 team via schema + runtime validation + migration prompt (C-08, R6)
Re-install full-idempotent output collapses to a single health-check card using buildSummary end-pass aggregation (C-21, R13)
ALL new user-facing strings routed through t() with en + zh-CN keys (C-05, C-16); reuse existing stageLabel(t) pattern (R2)

patterns: stageLabel(name) -> t(`cli.install.pipeline.label.${name}`) live-binding pattern for localized display
StageResult disposition model: ran | skipped | failed with installed[]/skipped[]/errors[]/payload
conventions: strict TypeScript (CI runs tsc --noEmit per workspace)
all user-facing copy via t() with both en + zh-CN locale keys
shared schema changes require pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build before runtime use

confidence.pressure_pass: TASK-002 (store dual-slot + schema migration) — read_first/action/convergence verified execution-ready: exact line anchors (119/124/267/271/519/572), migration-first ordering, shared rebuild step included, KT-MOD-0001 naming trap called out. store-only-e2e invocation corrected (CRIT-2).

warnings_fixed: WARN-1 stale i18n alt path removed
WARN-2 phantom i18n gate → pnpm test -- i18n
WARN-5 types.ts added to TASK-004 files
C-006 capability-table demotion added to TASK-004

boundary_grill.note: Plan scope == grill scope (install module). No re-scoping. Red-lines from grill carried as task constraints (C-07 clack logic untouched; C-05/C-16 t() en+zh-CN; C-01 no third render path).
